extensionDescription.message: AI-powered instant speech translation for all video meetings. Break language barriers with real-time voice translation.

clickToStart.message: Click "Open Eburon" below to start real-time translation.

quickStartInstructions.message: Configure your API key (OpenAI or Gemini) → Select "Eburon_Virtual_Mic" as microphone → Start speaking!

currentlyOn.message: Currently on $HOSTNAME$. Eburon works on these platforms:

refreshAndTry.message: Please refresh the page and try again.

gatherTownGuidance.message: Да бисте користили Eburon, изаберите "Eburon Virtual Microphone" у подешавањима микрофона.

wherebyGuidance.message: Да бисте користили Eburon, молимо изаберите "Eburon Virtual Microphone" у подешавањима микрофона и онемогућите смањење буке за боље перформансе.

defaultGuidance.message: To use Eburon, please select "Eburon Virtual Microphone" in your microphone settings.

discordGuidance.message: To use Eburon, please select "Eburon Virtual Microphone" in your microphone settings and disable Noise Suppression in Discord's Voice settings for better performance.

slackGuidance.message: To use Eburon in Slack Huddles, please start a Huddle, then select "Eburon Virtual Microphone" in your Video and Mic settings, and disable Noise Suppression in Audio & Video preferences for better performance.

teamsGuidance.message:
Ako ne vidite kompletan spisak audio uređaja u podešavanjima Teamsa:
1) Privremeno onemogućite Eburon ekstenziju i osvežite stranicu
2) Dozvolite Teamsu pristup mikrofonu i kameri kada budete upitani
3) Ponovo omogućite Eburon ekstenziju i osvežite stranicu ponovo
4) Dozvolite Eburonju pristup mikrofonu kada budete upitani. Sada biste trebali videti i prave uređaje i "Eburon Virtual Microphone" u podešavanjima.
